hero.subtitle: Create authentic UGC images and videos with your virtual influencer — same face, every scene, no studio, no camera.
hero.socialProof: USED BY CREATORS IN PORTUGAL, BRAZIL AND ANGOLA

pain.pain1_desc: You write a prompt in ChatGPT, the result isn't right. You rewrite it. Try again. 20 minutes wasted on a post that should take 2.
pain.pain2_desc: The AI gives you vague text you can't publish. You edit everything. What's the point of AI if you're doing all the work?
pain.pain3_desc: You pay for 3 different subscriptions and have no clue if you're spending €10 or €50 a month. Zero visibility.

demo.subtitle: Before sending to the AI, SavvyOwl transforms your request into a professional prompt. Better results on the first try.
demo.before_text: I want to make a dark video about the Titanic for my YouTube channel, something cinematic
demo.after_text: Viral title + Complete narrated script + 5 Seedance scenes in English with cinematic historical style + CapCut instructions. All copyable.

howItWorks.step1_desc: Write in plain language: 'Instagram caption for the launch', 'Stories copy for the sale', 'Reels ideas for this week'. No technical commands needed.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Your request is automatically transformed into a professional prompt and sent to the AI that best handles that type of content.
howItWorks.step3_desc: The response arrives in seconds. You see what it cost. If you liked it, save the prompt to reuse tomorrow with another client.

benefits.card1_desc: Your request is improved before reaching the AI. Stronger captions, sharper copy, hooks that grab. All on the first try.
benefits.card2_title: The right AI for each post
benefits.card2_desc: Quick caption? Uses the most efficient AI. Full blog article? Uses the most powerful one. Content strategy? Uses the most analytical. SavvyOwl picks automatically.
benefits.card3_desc: See the cost of every request, per day, per month, per client. Set a budget. No surprises on the bill.

pricing.packs_subtitle: Buy credits without a subscription. No expiration.

cta_final.subtitle: Create your account in 30 seconds. No credit card. Cancel anytime.

features.f1_desc: Automatic search for real viral YouTube videos. Pick one, and SavvyOwl models it for your niche with ready-to-use prompts.
features.f2_desc: Create professional images with Nano Banana directly in the app. Optimized prompts for thumbnails, posts and UGC.
features.f3_desc: Create cinematic videos with Google Seedance technology. Professional prompts for Reels, TikTok and Dark channels.
features.f4_desc: Complete flow: viral title, narrated script and Seedance scenes ready to go. Dark faceless content in 3 steps.
features.f5_desc: From viral concept to finished video: lip-sync script, dynamic scenes and CapCut assembly instructions.
features.f6_desc: Influencer UGC, copies, video scripts, calendars, eBooks, AI video prompts and more. Editable fields to customize.

tutorial.step1_desc: Sign up with email or Google. No credit card. Immediate access to chat and all templates.
tutorial.step2_desc: You have 10 professional templates: from Instagram copies to complete video pipelines. Fill in the fields and AI does the rest.
tutorial.step3_desc: Add your Google API key in Settings to generate images (Nano Banana) and videos (Seedance) directly in SavvyOwl.
tutorial.step4_desc: All prompts come in copyable blocks. Images and videos are downloadable. Paste in CapCut, schedule in Buffer and publish.

security.s1_desc: Login with Google OAuth or email/password. Encrypted sessions. Your account is yours alone.
security.s2_desc: Your Google API Key is stored only in your browser (localStorage). It is never sent to our servers or stored in the database.
security.s3_desc: All communications use HTTPS. Conversations are stored in your Supabase account with Row Level Security — only you can access them.
security.s4_desc: SavvyOwl does not store or reuse the images and videos you generate. They are created by the Google API and delivered directly to you.

faq.a1: Yes! The free plan includes 5 requests per day, 3 AI modes and access to all templates. For unlimited use, the Starter plan costs 9 euros/month.
faq.q2: Do I need an API key to use it?
faq.a2: No! Chat and templates work without an API key. You only need a Google API Key if you want to generate images (Nano Banana) or videos (Seedance) directly in the app.
faq.q3: How does BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) work?
faq.a3: Go to Settings, paste your Google API Key and you are done. The key is stored in your browser. You pay Google directly for the credits you use.
faq.a4: We have 10 templates: Influencer UGC, Copy/Caption Pro, Video Script, Content Calendar, eBook/Lead Magnet, AI Video Prompt, Scene Generator, Dark Channel Pipeline, Viral Pipeline Pro and Model Viral Video.
faq.a5: Yes. We use Supabase with Row Level Security, OAuth authentication, HTTPS on all communications. Your API key never leaves your browser.
faq.a6: Yes! No commitment, no minimum period. Cancel whenever you want directly in settings.

auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account!

chat.startConversationDesc: Pick a shortcut below or write what you need.
chat.contentCreatorBanner: Owl Creator — optimized for captions, scripts and copy
chat.upgradeMode: Upgrade to Starter to unlock this mode.
chat.deleteConfirmDesc: This will permanently delete this conversation and all its messages.

qa.caption: Instagram caption
qa.captionPrompt: Create an Instagram caption for a product launch post. Include a strong hook in the first line, relevant emojis, CTA, and 5 niche hashtags.
qa.reelsPrompt: Create a 15-second Reels script. Include a hook in the first 3 seconds, main content, and final CTA. Format: scene by scene with text and action.
qa.calendarPrompt: Create a 1-week Instagram content calendar (Monday to Friday). For each day: post type (carousel, reels, stories), theme, hook, and best posting time. Niche: digital marketing.
qa.storiesPrompt: Create a 5-Story Instagram sequence aimed at driving engagement. Include: poll, quiz, question box, and CTA to link in bio. Tone: casual and relatable.
qa.ugcPrompt: Create a 30-second UGC video script to promote a skincare product. Format: scene by scene with visual, audio, and on-screen text. Style: authentic, like a real review.
qa.ideasPrompt: Give me 10 Instagram content ideas for the digital marketing niche. For each idea: format (reels, carousel, post), hook, and unique angle. Focus on content that drives saves and shares.

prompts.title: Prompt Library
prompts.subtitle: Save and reuse your best prompts.
prompts.promptContent: Write your prompt... Use {variable} for dynamic parts
prompts.freeLimitPrompts: Free plan allows up to 3 saved prompts. Upgrade to save more.

starters.reels_content:
Create a Reels/TikTok script for a {duration}-second video about {topic}.

Style: {style}
Target audience: {audience}

Format scene by scene:
- HOOK (0-3s): What grabs attention
- CONTENT (3-{duration}s): Main value or story
- CTA (last 3s): What should viewers do

For each scene include:
- Visual: what appears on screen
- Audio: voiceover text
- Text overlay: on-screen text
starters.calendar_content:
Create a 1-week Instagram content calendar for a {niche} brand.

Monday to Friday, for each day provide:
- Post type (carousel, Reels, single image, Stories)
- Theme/topic
- Hook (first line)
- Best posting time
- Goal (awareness, engagement, conversion)

Mix content types for variety. Include at least 2 Reels and 1 carousel.
starters.ugc_content:
Create a UGC-style video script to promote {product}.

Duration: {duration} seconds
Platform: {platform}
Style: authentic, like a real customer review

Format scene by scene:
- SCENE 1: Hook + problem
- SCENE 2: Discovery of the product
- SCENE 3: Using the product (close-up)
- SCENE 4: Result + recommendation + CTA

For each scene: visual, audio (voiceover), and text on screen.
starters.stories_content:
Create a 5-Story Instagram sequence about {topic}.

Goal: {goal}
Tone: casual, relatable

For each Story:
- Type (text, photo, video, poll, quiz, question box)
- Visual description
- Text overlay
- Interactive element (sticker, poll, slider)

Story 5 must include CTA to link in bio or DM.
starters.ideas_content:
Give me 10 content ideas for {platform} in the {niche} niche.

For each idea:
- Format (Reels, carousel, post, Stories)
- Hook / first line
- Unique angle
- Expected engagement type (saves, shares, comments)

Focus on content that drives saves and shares. Mix educational, entertaining, and relatable content.
